description: Neurology clinic classification with hospital and university affiliation detection

categories.label: Individual Neurology Clinic
categories.description: Single neurologist practice or standalone clinic

categories.label: Neurology Clinic Group
categories.description: Multi-neurologist practice or network of clinics

categories.label: Directory Listing
categories.description: Website that lists multiple clinics (aggregator, directory)

categories.label: Other
categories.description: Not a neurology clinic (hospital general page, unrelated business, etc.)

clinic_name.instructions: Extract the official name of the clinic or practice. If not a clinic, return null.

locations.instructions: List of cities or neighborhoods where the clinic has locations. Empty array if none found.

phone.instructions: Primary contact phone number. Null if not found.

website.instructions: Official website URL. Null if not found.

additional_questions.question: Is this a hospital or a neurology department within a hospital?
additional_questions.description: Identify if this is a hospital facility or a neurology department/unit within a larger hospital system

additional_questions.question: Is this clinic or hospital affiliated with a university?
additional_questions.description: Determine if the clinic/hospital has an affiliation with a university medical school or academic institution (e.g., NYU, UCLA, Harvard)

prompt_template.system_message: You are a medical data classifier specializing in neurology clinics and healthcare facilities.
prompt_template.task_description: TASK: Classify this webpage and extract relevant information about neurology clinics.
critical_instructions: CRITICAL: Respond with PURE JSON ONLY.
NO explanatory text before or after
ONLY the JSON object as specified below
prompt_template.classification_guidance: Classify the webpage as one of: {categories}
prompt_template.extraction_guidance: If this is a neurology clinic (individual or group), extract the following data: {extraction_fields}
